text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as we're walking through the shopping
district...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Is it just me or are there more people around than
normal? I wonder what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ooh, a hot spring vacation! That sure sounds nice.
choice_data_list: Want to give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I guess I have to!
Excuse me! I'd like to try, please!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Of course! That'll be one raffle ticket!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, right. A raffle ticket...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Give me a minute. I'm gonna go do some
shopping!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser hurries back a little later
with a raffle ticket in hand and gives the raffle
machine a good spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: No way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I did it! I really did it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah! I'm so excited!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hehe. So when should we go?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
To the hot springs, silly! We're a little busy right
now, but how about we go once things calm down
a bit?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, the prize is a coupon for two.
But even still...
choice_data_list: You're sure you want to go with me?
You're sure you want to go with me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Why? Is it weird for me to invite you or
something?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I figured you were the obvious choice for this kind
of thing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you take care of me more than anyone.
You're like my partner or my, uh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Anyway, you don't have to come if you don't want to.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! Then, let's plan the trip together!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I can't wait! "Me, Trainer, and the Misty
Hot Spring Mystery!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Whoops! It started sounding like a movie title so
that just slipped out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Movies aside, now we've got one more thing to
look forward to!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oooh! First prize!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
We didn't win the hot spring getaway, but this
looks super delicious!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And the prize is for both of us, so we should eat it
together. Let's cook it up tonight!
choice_data_list: If that's what you want to do...
If that's what you want to do...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Of course it is! And if we're going to cook, I might
as well make some sides too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
On that note... mind if we drop by the grocery
store on the way back?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Matikanetannhauser prepares a
delicious-looking dinner for us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Deluxe carrot hamburger steak with salad, corn
soup, and...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Somen noodles!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The hamburger steak is pretty hefty, so I thought
it would go best with something that goes down
easy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I chopped up some leeks and perilla leaves too.
Hold on, let me get them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Odd pairing aside, all the food comes out terrific,
and we have a great dinner together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Second?! I was so close!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But second is still pretty good. The carrots all
look so sweet and shiny!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And if we've got this many, then we gotta share
with everyone!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Folks from the neighborhood used to always
bring the veggies they grew to our restaurant. I've
always wanted to return the favor!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, ma'am. I'm sorry to bother you so
late, but we harvested more carrots than we can
actually use, so I thought you might like some.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Did you come all the way over here just to give
those to me? How sweet! Actually, dearie, we've
got some extra potatoes if you'd like so—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait a minute! Why're we even roleplaying?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear later that their dorm was livelier than usual
that night.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Awww, only third?! Drats.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh well. That's how raffles go, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But since it's a special carrot and all, I'd like make
something delicious with it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
The stir-fried burdock roots at my parents'
restaurant is really good. Now, what was the
recipe again?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm just gonna call them real quick!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hi, Mom?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, she makes me her family's famous
stir-fried burdock using the carrot and some
burdock root.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Awww! Too bad!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I figured we wouldn't get the hot spring vacation,
but I would have at least liked to win a carrot...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I guess life really isn't fair sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is a little down in the dumps
for a while after.
